investorProfile.strategy: SA Adelaide metro — AUKUS defence catchment
investorProfile.ngRelevance: None — no AU income. NG losses carried forward until return.
investorProfile.absenteeSurcharge: $0 — AU citizens exempt in all states

marketContext.vacancyRate: 0.6% — tightest rental market of any AU capital
marketContext.aukusJobs: 8,000+ over next decade at Osborne + Edinburgh Defence Precinct
marketContext.northernCorridor: Salisbury SA3 ranked #1 Adelaide — +17.1% annual growth, $828k median

suburbRankings.whyTop: Best value AUKUS catchment. 17% growth, low crime, established suburb. Median $750k leaves room under $800k budget. 25 active listings = good stock.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Growth may moderate after +17% year. Ensure purchase price < $780k for cash fit.

suburbRankings.supplyRisk: MEDIUM — some new development Salisbury North
suburbRankings.whyTop: #1 growth suburb in Adelaide (+17.1%). Closest affordable suburb to both Osborne AND Edinburgh Defence Precinct. $722k median = strong cash fit.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Crime MEDIUM — avoid Salisbury Downs/North. Street selection critical. Rapid growth may moderate.

suburbRankings.whyTop: Steady 9.3% growth, good rental demand near Edinburgh. Family suburb, improving demographics. $780k median tight but findable under $800k.
suburbRankings.riskNote: At budget ceiling — must negotiate hard. Look for motivated sellers (high DOM, price reductions).

suburbRankings.whyTop: 13.3% growth, adjacent to Edinburgh Defence Precinct and Parafield Airport. Largest block sizes in the catchment = subdivision potential.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Crime improving (-10% year on year). Vendor discounting -4.4% = negotiate.

suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — small suburb, very limited stock
suburbRankings.whyTop: Fastest growing (+17.9%) with LOW crime. Premium family suburb. $740k median = good budget fit. Very tight vacancy (0.9%).
suburbRankings.riskNote: Small suburb — limited liquidity. 25 DOM = fast market, need to act quickly. Growth may moderate.

suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — established, Tea Tree Gully LGA
suburbRankings.whyTop: Most affordable option at $690k median = maximum cash buffer. Large blocks (700-900sqm) common. Low crime, family suburb in Tea Tree Gully.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Further from AUKUS sites (25min). Growth slower than northern corridor. Less direct defence demand spillover.

suburbRankings.whyTop: 12min to Osborne — closest affordable suburb to the shipyard. $680k median = best cash fit. Up-and-coming area with large blocks.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Crime MEDIUM, industrial adjacency (Gepps Cross Homemaker). Zero INVESTIGATE in current scan — most listings priced at or above median.

suburbRankings.whyTop: Inner north location — closer to CBD (18min) AND Osborne (15min). Low crime, established, good schools. 117 listings = deep market.
suburbRankings.riskNote: At budget ceiling ($760k median). Inner suburbs price faster — less upside vs outer north.

suburbRankings.whyTop: 14min to Osborne, 15min to CBD — dual demand driver. Low crime, inner north. 112 listings = very liquid market.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Zero INVESTIGATE — most listings at or above median. Need to find off-market or negotiate.

suburbRankings.whyTop: Best liquidity (171 listings). $700k median = good budget fit. Low crime, 9% growth, between Para Hills and Modbury.
suburbRankings.riskNote: Large stock = less scarcity pressure. Growth slower than Salisbury corridor.

topListings.reason: CASH FLOW POSITIVE at $420k. If genuine house (verify — may be land or unit). AUKUS catchment, 15min Osborne.
topListings.action: VERIFY IMMEDIATELY — price suggests land/unit/knock-down. If house: call agent TODAY.
riskFlags: Price may indicate land block, not house
Salisbury crime MEDIUM — check specific street

topListings.reason: 820sqm MEGA BLOCK. 4 bed house. Subdivision potential in Tea Tree Gully LGA. Low crime suburb.
topListings.action: Call agent. Check zoning for subdivision. 820sqm = potential for rear dwelling or subdivide into 2 lots.
riskFlags: Price estimated — may be higher than $690k

topListings.reason: 825sqm in fastest-growing suburb (+17.9%). LOW crime. 3/2 = strong rental. Subdivision potential.
topListings.action: Call agent. 825sqm in Walkley Heights could subdivide. Check council zoning. Premium suburb = premium exit.

topListings.reason: 655sqm block at $758k with 13.3% suburb growth. Adjacent Edinburgh Defence Precinct. Verified price.
topListings.action: Call agent. 655sqm may allow granny flat (check council). Near Edinburgh = strong defence rental demand.
riskFlags: At budget ceiling — stamp duty + LMI pushes total near $135k cash

topListings.reason: 950sqm MEGA BLOCK in Ingle Farm. Highest subdivision potential in the dataset. 12min to Edinburgh.
topListings.action: Call agent immediately. 950sqm could yield 2-3 lots. Check R40/R60 zoning.
riskFlags: Price estimated — 950sqm block may command premium above $780k

topListings.reason: Verified price $692k — below Salisbury median ($722k). 3/1/2 in #1 growth suburb. Strong cash fit.
topListings.action: Call agent. Below median = motivated seller. Salisbury +17.1% growth. Check street for crime.

topListings.reason: Verified current REA listing in Para Hills. 17% growth suburb, LOW crime, 22min Osborne.
topListings.action: Click REA link to see price/photos. Para Hills is the safest AUKUS play.
riskFlags: Price unknown — may be above budget

topListings.reason: Verified 3/1/4 on 580sqm. 4-car = tradie heaven = strong rental. Auction listed.
topListings.action: Set auction alert. 580sqm Para Hills with 4 car spaces rare. Strong rental to defence/tradie workers.

topListings.reason: 691sqm in Ingle Farm. 3/1/3 specs + large block = granny flat potential. Near Edinburgh.
topListings.action: Call agent. Check granny flat feasibility on 691sqm. Ingle Farm steady 9.3% growth.

topListings.reason: 1,909sqm MEGA BLOCK. 4/2 house. Massive subdivision potential if zoning allows. Good cash fit at $720k.
topListings.action: Call agent. 1909sqm = potential 3-4 lot subdivision = $500k+ profit if approved. Check Gawler council zoning.
riskFlags: SUPPLY RISK MEDIUM — Gawler growth area

cashAnalysis.cashFits: Properties under $750k fit comfortably in $135k cash. $750-800k = tight.

recommendation: PARA HILLS is the best risk-adjusted play. 17% growth, LOW crime, established suburb, 22min Osborne, $750k median under budget. Second pick SALISBURY at $722k median for closest AUKUS proximity but higher crime. MODBURY NORTH for value ($690k) with large blocks. Check REA links for Para Hills listings — 11 verified current listings with URLs.
